name: Apricot Almond Cake
recipeInstructions: Preheat the oven to 400°F and butter an 8-inch round cake pan. In a small saucepan, melt the butter. Let cool and stir in vanilla and almond extract. In a food processor, blend together the almonds, 2/3 cup sugar, and flour until the almonds are ground fine. In a small bowl, toss the apricots with the remaining tablespoon of sugar. Beat the egg whites with salt until stiff. Fold in the almond mixture. Spread the batter in the cake pan, arrange the apricot slices evenly on top, and bake for 20-25 minutes. Serve warm with whipped cream or ice cream.
